{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Underlord transformation
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Every [[Underlord]]'s transformation is triggered differently.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
